read_threads_per_source.description: Some readers, like EXR reader or OpenImageIO reader (which loads formats like jpeg, tiff), can read multiple frames in parallel which can improve performance when filesystem IO and decompress time are BOTH significant.

filepath_map_regex_replace.description: This preference must be a json array. Each element of the array must be another array of 4 strings. The first two strings are a pair of regex search and replace to map an incoming (virtual) path to a local filepath. The second pair of strings are likewise regex searh/replace expressions to map the local filepath back to the 'virtual' filepath.

user_filepath_map_regex_replace.description: This preference must be a json array. Each element of the array must be another array of 4 strings. The first two strings are a pair of regex search and replace to map an incoming (virtual) path to a local filepath. The second pair of strings are likewise regex searh/replace expressions to map the local filepath back to the 'virtual' filepath.

auto_gather_sources.description: Automatically search for extra media sources for freshly added media items
